hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "core.pipeline complete "; then TASK_ID=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP "complete \S+ \K\S+"); PROJECT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP "complete \K\S+"); CHANGES_FILE="forge_output/$PROJECT/changes.json"; if [ -f "$CHANGES_FILE" ]; then COUNT=$(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1],encoding=\"utf-8\")); print(sum(1 for c in d.get(\"changes\",[]) if c.get(\"task_id\")==sys.argv[2]))" "$CHANGES_FILE" "$TASK_ID" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$COUNT" = "0" ] || [ -z "$COUNT" ]; then echo "WARNING: No changes recorded for $TASK_ID. Run changes diff + changes record before completing."; else echo "Task $TASK_ID completed. $COUNT change(s) recorded."; fi; else echo "WARNING: No changes.json found. Run changes record for $TASK_ID."; fi; fi'
